text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year, Trainer. May we enjoy another
year of—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ah! But this will not be like any other year, will it?
This year, we'll run in the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We have but one primary goal to achieve in the
year ahead. Say it, Trainer.
choice_data_list: To win the Classic Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Precisely. That's the podium from which I will
preach my ideals.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This will be a crucial year for us. I trust that you
won't lag behind.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That being said...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We have a goal in sight, but no clear plan to get
there.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Tell me, what resolution do you think we should
set for ourselves?
choice_data_list:
Wisdom. We should aim to make the right
choices.
Health. We should try to take care of ourselves.
Versatility. We should try to diversify our skills.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Choosing wisely? I see. Certainly, we will soon be
facing a great many choices.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But do we not always strive to do the right thing?
Why go to the trouble of making that a
resolution?
choice_data_list: To keep us on the same page.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There will inevitably be times when we disagree
with one another.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But as long as we're both clear about our goal of
making the optimal choices, we'll always be able
to find common ground... That's the idea, at least.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I see. So that was your reasoning...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Whenever we clash, let us strive to find
the best path forward.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You wouldn't be trying to tell me something,
would you?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Considering the way you worry for my well-being,
this feels rather pointed.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I do not need to be reminded of the importance
of a healthy lifestyle, but... very well. I promise to
make an extra effort this year.
choice_data_list: And I promise that you're in good hands.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Yours, you mean? Well, well.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I look forward to seeing whether you can live up
to that promise.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So you think the fundamentals aren't enough, and
I must add more weapons to my arsenal?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps you're right. It is time to learn new
techniques in addition to refining old ones.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As luck would have it, there is one skill I was
hoping to refine.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Why, comedy, of course! What else?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking it was time to expand my
repertoire. I've been carrying around a notepad
to write down jokes as they come to me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Two notepads, in fact. Would you care to see
them?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Trainer? Why won't you look me in the eye?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: What are you doing? Why are you backing away?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're walking around the academy after deciding
on our resolution, when...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Well? Have you reconsidered your decision?

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text: I've thought about it, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If it's a lack of results that concerns you, I think
you're throwing in the towel too quickly.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I suggest that you—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ahem.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ah! President!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I had thought to wish you a happy New Year, but
the mood does not seem to be very festive.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If something is wrong, I would be happy to lend a
hand.

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text: N-no, it's all right! Everything's fine!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes... It's fine. More importantly, this is the year
in which you will face the trial of achieving the
Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You're bound to be busier than ever. Don't let us
distract you from your training.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I will explain everything in time. Until then, I only
ask for your understanding.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Very well. I'll see you at the New Year's meeting.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Very good. Now, if you'll excuse me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove and the student council general
manager depart.
choice_data_list: Are you sure you don't want to say something?
Are you sure you don't want to say something?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I asked the general manager if something was
bothering her earlier, but she insisted that all was
well.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Whatever it is, she is confiding in Air Groove
because she doesn't feel comfortable sharing it
with me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: It would only be insensitive to involve myself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry for troubling you with student council
affairs. I know that it's not in your job description.
choice_data_list: If it's affecting you, it's important to me.
If it's affecting you, it's important to me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I appreciate your concern.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
However, I would rather you put this out of your
mind. You have races to plan for.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Our first objective is the Satsuki Sho. I'm counting
on you to lead us to victory, Trainer.
